column2: わたしもがくせいです。
column6: も: additive particle — 'also/too'; X applies just as Y does
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:も source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column2: かれはえいごもはなせます。
column6: も: inclusive addition — extends a predication to include one more item
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:も source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top5k complexity:intro

column6: も vs は: replacement role — も replaces は or が, adding 'also'
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:も source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column1: 兄も妹も犬が好きです。
column2: あにもいもうともいぬがすきです。
column3: Both my brother and my sister like dogs.
column6: も: emphasis with quantity — Nも = 'as many/much as N'; emphatic amount
column7: double も for 'both A and B'
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:も source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column1: コーヒーもお茶も飲みます。
column2: こーひーもおちゃものみます。
column3: I drink both coffee and tea.
column6: も: universal scope — 誰も, 何も = 'everyone/everything' (with neg)
